    • org.springframework.cloud.task.repository.dao.JdbcTaskExecutionDao
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      EXTERNAL_EXECUTION_ID_WHERE_CLAUSE
      "where EXTERNAL_EXECUTION_ID = :externalExecutionId "
      public static final String
      FROM_CLAUSE
      "%PREFIX%EXECUTION"
      public static final String
      RUNNING_TASK_WHERE_CLAUSE
      "where TASK_NAME = :taskName AND END_TIME IS NULL "
      public static final String
      SELECT_CLAUSE
      "TASK_EXECUTION_ID, START_TIME, END_TIME, TASK_NAME, EXIT_CODE, EXIT_MESSAGE, ERROR_MESSAGE, LAST_UPDATED, EXTERNAL_EXECUTION_ID, PARENT_EXECUTION_ID "
      public static final String
      TASK_NAME_WHERE_CLAUSE
      "where TASK_NAME = :taskName "
